name: keplergl-map
description: Create interactive map visualizations and export to standalone HTML using the keplergl Python package.

interface.shortDescription: Interactive geospatial map visualizations with kepler.gl
interface.longDescription: Create interactive map visualizations and export to standalone HTML using the keplergl Python package. Supports point maps, arc/line maps, heatmaps, hexbin aggregations, H3 hexagons, GeoJSON polygons, trip animations, and more from DataFrames, GeoDataFrames, GeoJSON, or CSV data.
defaultPrompt: Use kepler.gl Map to create an interactive point map from a CSV file.
Use kepler.gl Map to visualize GeoJSON polygons on a map.
Use kepler.gl Map to create a heatmap from coordinate data.
